$note: Captured snapshot of the COMPARED forecast/intelligence product for the azimuth benchmark (synthesis/benchmark.py). Quoted by product + capture date; NOT surfaced as an azimuth channel and NOT an L1 source. Refresh with pull_benchmark_foils.py.

foil.title: Inflation and rates pressure from Cuba infrastructure fragility state
foil.scenario_short: Cuba infrastructure fragility state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through energy supply shock, with 47% pressure and 54% state confirmation. For now, the base case stays near 64% over the 30d. Actors absorb...
foil.perspective_strategic: Cuba infrastructure fragility state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through energy supply shock, with 47% pressure and 54% state confirmation is setting the strategic baseline, and the current 62% probability implies a live but not settled risk path.
foil.perspective_contrarian: No directly matched headlines are currently attached to Cuba. If that restraint persists, the forecast can move below the current 62% baseline. Actors prioritize containment and the system drifts toward stabilization unless new hard signals emerge.
foil.actor_lens: Commodity traders: Price whether stress in Cuba becomes durable over the 30d. Rebalance positions if the probability path moves away from 62%.
foil.top_signal: Cuba infrastructure fragility state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through energy supply shock, with 47% pressure and 54% state confirmation

foil.title: Inflation and rates pressure from Eastern Mediterranean maritime disruption state
foil.scenario_short: Eastern Mediterranean maritime disruption state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through shipping cost shock, with 47% pressure and 71% state confirmation. For now, the base case stays near 60% over the 30d....
foil.perspective_strategic: Eastern Mediterranean maritime disruption state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through shipping cost shock, with 47% pressure and 71% state confirmation is setting the strategic baseline, and the current 57% probability implies a live but not settled risk path.
foil.perspective_contrarian: The current 75% confidence level still leaves room for reversal. If that restraint persists, the forecast can move below the current 57% baseline. Actors prioritize containment and the system drifts toward stabilization unless new hard signals emerge.
foil.actor_lens: Commodity traders: Price whether stress in Eastern Mediterranean becomes durable over the 30d. Rebalance positions if the probability path moves away from 57%.
foil.top_signal: Eastern Mediterranean maritime disruption state is feeding inflation and rates pressure through shipping cost shock, with 47% pressure and 71% state confirmation

seismic-infrastructure.absence_reason: No product publishes a seismic forecast — earthquakes are not predictable, so there is no forecast/intel alternative to azimuth's observed USGS record. This is the honest inverse: for an observed natural-hazard fact, the sourced record IS the only trustworthy source.
